synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-25732 Oracle Linux 9 leapp-repository bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25732
description:
[0.22.0-1.0.6]
- Implement Inhibitor for --iso conflict if problematic files present [Orabug: 38489510]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25732

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-25732.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-0.22.0-1.0.6.el9.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-deps-0.22.0-1.0.6.el9.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-0.22.0-1.0.6.el9.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-deps-0.22.0-1.0.6.el9.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/leapp-repository-0.22.0-1.0.6.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.22.0-1.0.6]
- Implement Inhibitor for --iso conflict if problematic files present [Orabug: 38489510]
